top_signals.title: UBS's Hoffmann-Burchardi: Markets Favor Active Investing (Correct)
top_signals.summary: Ulrike Hoffmann-Burchardi, global equities CIO at UBS Global Wealth Management, says that after a decade of mega cap dominance reinforced by passive investing, it's now time for active investing. She speaks on "Bloomberg Surveillance." (Corrects name of guest in video and description) (Source: Bloomberg)
